_meta.description: Deterministic seed facts for the Phase 54.1 aq-memory-recall-benchmark gate

description: Deterministic seed facts for the Phase 54.1 aq-memory-recall-benchmark gate.

seeds.content: Python asyncio uses an event loop to cooperatively schedule coroutines, tasks, callbacks, futures, and nonblocking IO.
The hybrid coordinator is the local AI harness service on port 8003 that routes queries, memory recall, tools, orchestration, and local/remote model policy.
NixOS flake configuration options are declared in flake.nix and Nix modules under nix/modules; host facts and options provide reproducible system configuration.
Run aq-qa 0 for phase 0 service health checks; use aq-qa <phase> --json for machine-readable validation.
Agent memory uses episodic, semantic, procedural, working, error_solutions, and interaction_history tiers through MemoryBroker.
Switchboard routing profiles define local and remote lanes such as continue-local, local-tool-calling, remote-reasoning, and code-focused compact routing.
The main llama.cpp inference server listens on port 8080; the embedding llama server listens on port 8081.

seeds.summary: AIDB vector search API live benchmark canonical answer
seeds.content: For the probe AIDB vector search API: AIDB exposes vector search API capabilities using Qdrant, pgvector, PostgreSQL, Redis, and RAG retrieval on service port 8002.
The workflow DAG executor supports execute and status endpoints and applies retry policy through workflow graph execution templates.
Intent classification maps task intent to routing profiles and domain capabilities, keeping explicit specialized domains opt-in unless promoted to default.

seeds.summary: MemoryBroker temporal validity live benchmark canonical answer
seeds.content: For the probe MemoryBroker temporal validity: MemoryBroker temporal validity uses valid_from and valid_until fields to decide whether memory rows are currently recallable.
TraceCollector query trace schema records trace_id, intent, profile, retrieval hits, token counts, latency, and RAG skip state.
The eval_trend table stores evaluation score trend history used by aq-report and dashboard evaluation cards.
WorkflowCheckpointer persists workflow checkpoints so interrupted DAG or agent workflows can resume from saved state.
RagAugmentor provides active retrieval augmentation; L6 health expects RAG posture to be active with successful retrieval evidence.
Phase 54 agentic first elevation connected memory, routing, retrieval, and execution into an agentic-first architecture.

seeds.summary: aq-report RAG posture active historical live benchmark canonical answer
seeds.content: For the probe aq-report RAG posture active historical: aq-report labels RAG posture active when recent retrieval augmentation is present and historical when only old retrieval evidence exists.
Run scripts/governance/tier0-validation-gate.sh --pre-commit before committing; never bypass with --no-verify.

seeds.summary: Qdrant collection agent-memory-semantic live benchmark canonical answer
seeds.content: For the probe Qdrant collection agent-memory-semantic: agent-memory-semantic is the Qdrant collection name for semantic memory vectors used by the agent memory recall path.
delegate-to-gemini routing analysis is used for Gemini collaboration and review, with stale or incomplete delegation rows reconciled before acceptance.
